verdict.answer_first: A leads harder: "The decrement." B also answers first: "`i--` decrements"; A is more bottom-line.
verdict.decisiveness: Both commit to one fix: "Change it to `i++`".
verdict.fabrication: Both infer undefined logging; B is stronger: "for every negative index".
verdict.actionability: A is easier: shorter cause, exact fix, same corrected code.
